title: The Cock & The Pearl
content:
A rooster, while scratching for grain,
    Found a Pearl. He just paused to explain
    That a jewel's no good
    To a fowl wanting food,
    And then kicked it aside with disdain.

    If He Ask Bread Will Ye Give Him A Stone?
meaning:
This evocative piece by Walter Crane, titled "The Cock & The Pearl", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
